$comment: Percentage thresholds apply to future JS coverage tooling; this repository's Bash suites gate on pass/fail.

enforcement.command: bash -c 'for t in tests/*/test-*.sh; do bash "$t" || exit 1; done && node lib/sync-resources.js --check'
enforcement.description: Orchestrator agents MUST run this Bash suite pass/fail gate before marking any task complete or creating a PR. Percentage thresholds apply to future JS coverage tooling.
